title: [Non-record] LoRA TTT + HParams (val_bpb=1.16973333)
author: Mistobaan
body:
## Summary
- add the `2026-03-20_better_baseline_params` record for the 10min/16mb track
- include the submitted `train_gpt.py`, run logs, and aggregated `submission.json`
- document the hyperparameter deltas relative to `2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT`

## Details
This keeps the same LoRA TTT evaluation path as `2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT` and updates the baseline defaults to an 8x768 configuration with a 2048 sequence length, a 262144-token training batch, lower learning rates, lower logit softcap, and `beta1=0.70`.

## Validation
- staged files reviewed locally
- PR is scoped to the currently staged files only
submission_readme:
# Better Baseline Params

This record starts from [2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT](../2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT). The code path is unchanged from that record: [train_gpt.py](train_gpt.py) differs from [2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT/train_gpt.py](../2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT/train_gpt.py) only inside `Hyperparameters`, so the per-document LoRA TTT evaluation is the same mechanism as the 2026-03-17 base.

## Diff vs [2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT](../2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT)

- `TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS`: `524288 -> 262144`
- `TRAIN_SEQ_LEN`: `1024 -> 2048`
- `NUM_LAYERS`: `9 -> 8`
- `MODEL_DIM`: `512 -> 768`
- `LOGIT_SOFTCAP`: `30.0 -> 10.0`
- `TIED_EMBED_LR`: `0.05 -> 0.03`
- `MATRIX_LR`: `0.04 -> 0.02`
- `SCALAR_LR`: `0.04 -> 0.02`
- `BETA1`: `0.9 -> 0.70`
